corrections.note: Printed body reads εὐωδία, not εὐοδία.
Lemma in apparatus should match printed body form εὐωδία.
Apparatus variant is λογω, matching the image; transcript incorrectly has λογοις.

notes: Running head matches. Body is otherwise accurate; marginal line numbers (e.g. '(17) 16') are correctly represented and not treated as errors. Apparatus mostly correct aside from the noted lemma/variant mismatches.
